properties.displayName: App Service Environment should have Control and Data Ports bound to ILB
properties.description: This policy applies exclusively to Mission Platform products and services; usage outside of these scopes is not supported. Setting Internal Load Balancing Mode (ilbMode) to 'Web, Publishing' binds HTTP/HTTPS traffic on ports 80/443 and control/data channel ports for FTP to an ILB allocated Virtual Network Address.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
